title: Nanotate - Total annotations
author: Olga Giraldo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Annotations about protocol steps and material entities (i.e., bio-samples, equipment, reagents), participating in each one of them. This set of annotations were used to calculate Inter-annotator agreement.
steps_raw: Annotations about protocol steps and material entities (i.e., bio-samples, equipment, reagents), participating in each one of them. This set of annotations were used to calculate Inter-annotator agreement.
